# MENZERNA MEDIUM CUT POLISHING FOAM PAD YELLOW 150MM

[Be the first to review this product](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-medium-cut-polishing-foam-pad-yellow-150mm.html#review-form)

## CarCare24.eu - 26900224011, Menzerna Medium Cut polishing foam pad removes small scratches, holograms, and paint imperfections.

[**Details**](#description)
**Why Buy this Product?
**Durable long lasting foam.
Medium cutting foam pad.
Remove small scratches, holograms and more.

**About this product:
**Menzerna Medium Cut Foam Pad is perfect for use with fine abrasive polishes. Menzerna Medium Cut Foam Pad removes small scratches, holograms, and other surface imperfections. The Medium Cut Foam Pad works best with the Menzerna Medium Cut polishes. The unique foam formulation delivers perfect cut and generates shine.
